prestazioni: VR6 3.2L (Engine Code: BFH/BML) forced induction conversion using a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo manifold by DieselGeek, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a GReddy Type-S intercooler (core dimensions: 24" x 6" x 3.5") for optimized airflow and heat dissipation under boost (target: 12-14 psi on 93 octane).

Full forged internals by Mahle Motorsports including forged 9:1 compression pistons (Mahle Part #53990), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (Part #CWL-2.025), and a billet crankshaft (Manley Part #14425) to handle 550+ whp reliably. Upgraded ARP head studs (Part #206-4301) and a reinforced VR6-specific head gasket by Elring (Part #618.460) for cylinder sealing under high boost.

Custom ECU calibration by United Motorsport (USRT) Stage 3+ software with a standalone AEM Infinity 7 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping, paired with a Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump (340 LPH), Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors (Part #62400001), and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup to prevent oil buildup in the intake tract. Exhaust system features a 3" turbo-back setup by Supersprint with a 200-cell metallic catalytic converter and a custom X-pipe for optimized scavenging.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Part #RB-WB-VW001) with custom carbon fiber fender flares (3.5" extended front, 4" extended rear) and a custom front splitter by Varis Japan (120mm overhang, 3K twill carbon fiber) for aggressive aero balance. Rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon (Part #VW-GOLF4-DIFF) with integrated titanium exhaust tips by Remus (Part #0880070).

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Part #DFV001) with custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 9kg/mm rear) and adjustable camber plates by 034 Motorsport (Part #034-401-101S) for aggressive stance and track-ready alignment. Wheel setup: BBS LM-R 18x9.5 ET30 (front) and 18x10.5 ET35 (rear) with 245/35/18 and 275/35/18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires for maximum grip.

Full interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (Part #387060) in Alcantara/leather (custom red stitching), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip), and a custom roll cage by Autopower Industries (8-point bolt-in, T45 steel) with integrated harness bar for safety. Gauge cluster features a Defi Advance BF series (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted on a custom A-pillar pod by AEM.
